headline: CERTIFIED ACROSS EVERY BORDER
subheading: How the Qualified Person turns imported batches into a controlled, defensible, inspection-ready release.
flux_prompt: Editorial clinical-luxury composition evoking cross-border pharmaceutical importation and Qualified Person certification: a stylised world-map arc of glowing flight-path lines sweeping from a distant manufacturing region toward a single illuminated quality-control checkpoint, where a sealed glass vial and a folded certificate-of-analysis document rest on a pristine inspection bench beside a temperature-logged shipping container rendered in soft focus. A subtle official wax-seal motif and a chain-of-custody link symbolise non-delegable legal accountability and supply-chain integrity. Deep navy background, luminous teal and cyan light gradients tracing the transit routes, a single fresh-green accent glow marking the approved release gate. Calm, premium, abstract and conceptual, shallow depth of field, soft professional daylight. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
